LanguageData.ExtendedMagazine.description: This weapon's magazine holds 50% more ammunition than normal.
LanguageData.HollowPointRounds.label: improved terminal ballistics
LanguageData.HollowPointRounds.description: This weapon's bullets have been designed for maximum fragmentation after striking a target, dealing more damage than normal.
LanguageData.BirdshotPellets.label: wide bore
LanguageData.BirdshotPellets.description: This weapon has a wider bore than normal, causing considerably larger spread.
LanguageData.Lightweight.description: This weapon is much lighter than normal, lowering its aiming time at the cost of increased recoil.
LanguageData.GrenadeLauncher.description: This weapon has an attached grenade launcher capable of firing a variety of different munitions.
